research_question: Can we keep the recalibrated v7 momentum-only score and 0.70 ranking liquidity guard fixed, but replace full daily Top10 refresh with one deterministic incumbent-retention rule, so that the weak signal edge is preserved with lower turnover and better cost robustness?

guard_contract.guard_definition: Freeze the recalibrated v7 ranking guard: only rows that are already ranking_eligible_D0 and whose 20-day average amount cross-sectional liquidity rank is >= 0.70 on the same signal_date may enter the ranking universe.
guard_contract.treatment_of_rows_below_guard: Remain in audit tables but must be excluded from ranking_state_daily eligibility.

portfolio_refresh_contract.refresh_definition: Keep score, guard, TopK width, and execution logic fixed. Across signal_dates, retain an incumbent holding if it still has rank_position <= 20 on the new signal_date and still satisfies the frozen guard plus tradability requirements. Only vacated slots may be refilled from the highest-ranked non-held eligible names until 10 names are held.
portfolio_refresh_contract.replacement_rule: Fill remaining slots with highest-ranked non-held eligible names in ascending rank order until 10 names are held.
portfolio_refresh_contract.target_weight_rule: Equal-weight across currently held names after refresh; unfilled slots remain cash.

constants_frozen.selection_contract: same recalibrated v7 score and same 0.70 ranking liquidity guard

disallowed_changes: Do not change score features or score weights.
Do not change the recalibrated 0.70 ranking liquidity guard threshold or its stage.
Do not change benchmark or cost contracts.
Do not change sample labels or return definitions.
Do not sweep multiple hold-band thresholds.
Do not sweep multiple refresh rules.
Do not combine this round with separate extraction-formula or turnover-penalty logic.
notes: This round changes exactly one core dimension: the cross-date portfolio refresh rule.
The purpose is to test whether preserving incumbents inside one fixed hold band can keep more of the weak momentum edge after trading costs than full daily Top10 refresh.
If this round fails, future work should not continue parameter sweeps inside the same retention-band family without a new diagnostic justification.
